name: io.github.cphoskins/meetalfred-mcp
description: MCP server for MeetAlfred — campaigns, leads, replies, tags, and activity (webhook + internal API)

environmentVariables.name: MEETALFRED_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your MeetAlfred API key (Settings > Integrations > Webhooks)

environmentVariables.name: MEETALFRED_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Webhook API base URL — override for white-label instances (default: https://api.meetalfred.com/api/integrations/webhook)

environmentVariables.name: MEETALFRED_JWT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: JWT token for internal API access — enables tags CRUD, campaign management, and detailed replies

environmentVariables.name: MEETALFRED_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Internal API base URL — override for white-label instances (default: https://api.meetalfred.com/api/v1)
